zh.lifeSummary: Roger de Heveningham是Philip Heveningham和Lora Ufford的兒子，出生在英國素福爾可維寧加姆。他於1235年與Cecily Motley ( 8 Children)在英國英格蘭素福爾可維寧加姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1281年之後。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Roger de Heveningham was born in Heveningham, Suffolk, England as the son of Philip Heveningham and Lora Ufford. He married Cecily Motley ( 8 Children) in 1235, in Heveningham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died after 1281.

fr.lifeSummary: Roger de Heveningham est né à Heveningham, Suffolk, Angleterre, fils de Philip Heveningham et Lora Ufford. Il a épousé Cecily Motley ( 8 Children) en 1235, à Heveningham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé après 1281.

de.lifeSummary: Roger de Heveningham wurde in Heveningham, Suffolk, England, als Sohn von Philip Heveningham und Lora Ufford geboren. Er hat 1235 in Heveningham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Cecily Motley ( 8 Children) geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb nach 1281.

it.lifeSummary: Roger de Heveningham è nato il nel Heveningham, Suffolk, England come figlio di Philip Heveningham e Lora Ufford. Lui sposato Cecily Motley ( 8 Children) nel 1235, nel Heveningham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1281.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de HeveninghamはイギリススフォルクヘベニンガムでPhilip HeveninghamとLora Uffordの息子として生まれた。1235年にイギリスイギリススフォルクヘベニンガムでCecily Motley ( 8 Children)と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1281年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Heveningham(은)는 영국 수폴크 헤베닝함에서 Philip Heveningham(와)과 Lora Ufford의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1235년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 헤베닝함에서 Cecily Motley ( 8 Children)(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1281년 이후 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Roger de Heveningham родился в местности хивенингхам, суффолк, Англия. Его родителей звали Philip Heveningham и Lora Ufford. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily Motley ( 8 Children) в 1235 г. в местности хивенингхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер после 1281 г.
